ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for and with Verna Shaheen.

Ms. Alavi addressed the issue of the investments stating that they would like to retain the investments, that their primary strategy is growth, that they are getting a better rate than any other type of account anywhere else, that the trust held $62,000.00 ten years ago and currently has $28,000.00, that the yield justifies the yearly fee and that it produces income each month. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Siracusa appearing for and with Verna Shaheen, trustee. Camille Merrill is also in court. Court questions the relationship between the trustee and the case manager and how the case manager was paid. The case manager is on staff with a free service program. The trustee is reducing her fees to $55.00 an hour for a total fee of $2,000.00. She is authorized to act as case manager provided that her services are duplicative of services provided by third parties. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota. Counsel will prepare an order on the case manager issue.
